# neon_projects (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of Neon projects.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_projects" "example" {
  query = {
    search = "my-project"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `query` (Attributes) Query parameters for filtering projects. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--query))

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) The list of projects. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `query`

Optional:

- `org_id` (String) Filter by organization ID.
- `recoverable` (Boolean) Show only deleted projects within the recovery window.
- `search` (String) Search by project name or ID.


<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the project was created, in RFC 3339 format.
- `id` (String) The project ID.
- `name` (String) The project name.
- `pg_version` (Number) The Postgres version.
- `region_id` (String) The region identifier.
- `updated_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the project was last updated, in RFC 3339 format.
